---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about integration, APIs, client configs, or the roadmap.
title: "[QUESTION] "
labels: question, documentation
assignees: ""
---

**What is your question?**
Please describe what you are looking to understand, clarify, or set up.

**Where in the codebase/docs does this apply?**
If applicable, point to the documentation section, file path, or function interface.

**Provide context**
Are you trying to integrate Fourier into a wallet, build on top of our API, or configure a local dev setup? Provide any useful context.
